subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Numerous letters have been received from thee concerning the election of the members of the Spiritual Assembly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکاتیب متعدده از شما رسید در باب انتخاب اعضاء محفل روحانی از
subcodes.subjects: @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @House of Justice
